description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ffsubsync that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to build and test the project on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-22.04, windows-latest, and macos) and Python versions (3.7 to 3.13). For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, lint with flake8, and run unit and integration tests with pytest, with coverage reporting on ubuntu-latest jobs.
